channel.title: Text on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Text on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to convert speech into text using modern AI powered Alrite.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-rN4-bwE439A/Y7hnQUoCJJI/AAAAAAAAQN8/4oB-8xzowvEy5eEVeue2LYlynXYKwipWgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1673029434370780-0.png" alt=""> Text, the one that you’re reading now which is in digital format of english language that you can write in numerous languages thanks to modern technologies but as you may know we people in society first used speech to communicate basically sound form voice languages and then eventually we found a way to express voice languages in written form since then majority of people started using number of written languages to not just communicate but also share all types of information to people worldwide.

item.title: Plop - Read addictive texting chat stories in many genres for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-UZyQjw9yZ9s/YZvEcMH809I/AAAAAAAAHbM/BpDwQjWo9boV6EH0LE5KgwFG4qULHfCagCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1637598316190866-0.png" alt=""> Entertainment, is very necessary for life to relieve from stress and sad moments so to provide entertainment in this digital world alot of talented & visionary people around the world created and developed amazing platforms on internet where you can find entertaining content in numerous genres from creators through content streaming platforms like YouTube, Netflix, Amazon prime etc and social network platforms like facebook, twitter, instagram etc and websites, blogs which have content that can give entertainment.
